scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,CASHIER,ADMIN" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix cashier-app" "npm run dev --prefix admin-app"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix cashier-app && npm install --prefix admin-app
scripts.seed:all: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
